features: Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.0.41! This update introduces our intelligent phased rollout engine.
Power Users First: Our most active users with high streaks or session counts will now receive the newest cutting-edge updates immediately upon release.
Stability for Casual Users: Users who study less frequently will receive updates 3 days after the initial release to guarantee maximum stability.
🏆 Achievements Modal: We completely redesigned the Profile achievements section into a sleek scrollable Trophy Room that tracks all of your lifetime awards.
